title: AcceptanceCriterion
description: A testable acceptance criterion derived from an Intent's deliverable — VALIDATES-edged back to the Intent. The Gherkin triple makes it observable; unmeasurable criteria are flagged, never dropped (discover/clusters/scope.py; Spec 317).

gherkin.description: Given/When/Then triple. Spec 147 Driver fills a sharper form in Slice 2; Slice 1 uses a deterministic fallback.

measurable.description: True when the Then clause carries an observable check; False for criteria resting only on vague qualifiers (flagged, not dropped).
